rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) is unrelated to Educ. Code §29.016, which governs special education due process hearing evaluations without parental consent. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: A special education hearing officer in an impartial due process hearing brought under 20 U.S.C. Section 1415 may issue an order or decision that authorizes one or more evaluations of a student
_note: No conflict; provisions address entirely different subject matters.
